do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test (test 1): strong identity field entity_type differs (news_organization vs organization). The second record's description 'Provider of terminals, communication lines, PeopleSoft data licenses, and MTM pricing to MTA' identifies Bloomberg L.P., not the news organization. Shared name 'Bloomberg' alone is insufficient; different entity types force distinct canonical records.

weak_aliases.reason: Shared key 'entity_bloomberg' is a weak alias across different entity types; useful for search but not merge authority.
Shared key 'entity_bloomberg' is a weak alias across different entity types; useful for search but not merge authority.

suggestion.rationale: entity_type differs (news_organization vs organization) per payload identity fields, and evidence confirms distinct real-world entities (Bloomberg News vs Bloomberg L.P.). The contradiction test (test 1) of the Identity Merge Canon applies, forcing do_not_merge.
